creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
The port devel/p5-Readonly ships two CPAN modules in one port. This PR
updates the version of Readonly-XS module shipped with the port to
v.1.05. By mistake an existing PR (ports/146972) filed to package
Readonly-XS module in a separate port. Please close that PR. My
apologies for not being careful with that.
